Press ^3[{+speed_throw}]^7 to create Hammer Storm
Press ^3[{+speed_throw}]^7 + ^3[{+attack}]^7   to fire Hammer Bolt
zmtrials/door_man_desc: Open all Doors in the Map
zmtrials/shielded_desc: Possess the Shield at the End of the Round

Press ^3[{+attack}]^7 to fire Ray of Life
Press ^3[{+speed_throw}]^7  or ^3[{+melee}]^7 to Melee
